problem: Everyone in a class of 30 students takes math and history.  Seven students received an A in history and 13 received an A in math, including four that received an A in both courses. How many students did not receive an A in any of these two courses?

classified_questions.question: Can you explain what the problem is asking for?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How many students received an A in history only? How many received an A in math only?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: If you add the number of students who received an A in history only and the number of students who received an A in math only, what is the total?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How can you adjust the total to account for the students who received an A in both courses?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many different students received an A in at least one of the courses?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many students did not receive an A in any of the courses?
classified_questions.label: b
